validate.prior_notes: Fixed regex escaping issue in test_label_names_and_constants function. The test was using a regex pattern with ["\'] which broke the Python string escaping when embedded in a subprocess call. Changed to use a cleaner pattern matching double-quoted strings r'\$LabelConfirmed\s*=\s*"([^"]+)"'. All 11 tests now pass.
